message:
fix(ad): remove unused SVD VJP transpose and update comment

Remove dead _v_val = transpose_2d(vt_t) assignment — V is used
implicitly via Vt throughout the SVD backward pass and the explicit
transpose was computed but never read. Update comment to clarify.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
